title: Elon Musk's stratospheric rise to trillionaire status - in charts
summary: The BBC provides a detailed visual breakdown of how billionaire Elon Musk's wealth has grown to trillionaire levels. The analysis uses charts to illustrate the trajectory and key factors contributing to his extraordinary financial accumulation.
content: The BBC breaks down how the tech mogul's fortune has grown.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克财富飙升至万亿美元 - 图表分析
zh.summary: 英国广播公司(BBC)提供了一份详细的可视化分析,展示了亿万富翁埃隆·马斯克的财富如何增长至万亿美元水平。该分析使用图表来说明其财富增长的轨迹以及促成其非凡财务积累的关键因素。

title: Jim Cramer says it's not too late to buy SpaceX — under one condition
summary: Jim Cramer suggests SpaceX could still be an attractive investment for long-term investors viewing it as a space exploration opportunity. The comment reflects analyst sentiment on SpaceX's valuation after its market debut.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said it's not too late to buy SpaceX if investors view the company as a long-term bet on space exploration.

zh.title: Jim Cramer表示现在买SpaceX还不晚——只需满足一个条件
zh.summary: Jim Cramer建议，对于将SpaceX视为太空探索机会的长期投资者来说，SpaceX仍可能是有吸引力的投资选择。这一观点反映了分析师对SpaceX上市后估值的看法。

title: There’s a 68% chance the stock market ends the year higher. Why the headlines shouldn’t disrupt your portfolio.
summary: A 68% statistical probability indicates the stock market will likely end the year higher, though daily volatility and headlines create psychological pressure. Investors who ignore short-term noise gain a strategic advantage over reactive traders.
content: Blocking out the daily noise gives you a clear edge over short-term chaos.

zh.title: 股市年底上涨概率为68%。为什么新闻标题不应该打乱你的投资组合
zh.summary: 68%的统计概率表明股市可能在年底收高，尽管日常波动和新闻标题会造成心理压力。那些忽视短期噪音的投资者相比反应过度的交易员更具战略优势。

title: Paramount-WBD merger wins approval from DOJ
summary: The U.S. Department of Justice has approved the approximately $110 billion Paramount-WBD merger, marking a critical regulatory milestone. The deal could still face legal challenges from state attorneys general despite federal approval.
content: The DOJ approval is an important milestone for the roughly $110 billion deal, though it could still face legal challenges from state attorneys general.

zh.title: Paramount-WBD合并获得司法部批准
zh.summary: 美国司法部已批准了约1100亿美元的Paramount-WBD合并，这是一个关键的监管里程碑。尽管获得联邦批准，该交易仍可能面临州检察长的法律挑战。

title: ‘This is not a flash in the pan’: Why value stocks are beating growth by such a wide margin
summary: Value stocks are dramatically outperforming growth equities this year as investor confidence broadens beyond technology into earnings-generating sectors. The shift reflects growing optimism about diversified economic growth outside big tech.
content: Value stocks are putting up big gains this year that widely surpass growth equities, with investors appearing optimistic about earnings growth broadening beyond technology.

zh.title: "这不是昙花一现"：价值股为何以如此巨大的优势战胜成长股
zh.summary: 今年价值股的表现远超成长股，因为投资者信心从科技行业扩展到盈利产生的行业。这种转变反映了投资者对科技巨头以外多元化经济增长越来越乐观的态度。

title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
summary: Elon Musk has become the world's first trillionaire with a $1.11 trillion net worth, coinciding with SpaceX's debut on Nasdaq at a $2.2 trillion valuation. The milestones mark unprecedented wealth concentration and private space company valuations.
content: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克成为世界首位万亿富豪，SpaceX股市首秀飙升
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克净资产达1.11万亿美元，成为世界首位万亿富豪，同时SpaceX在纳斯达克上市估值达2.2万亿美元。这些里程碑事件标志着前所未有的财富集中和私营航天公司估值创新高。

title: How Elon Musk nailed the SpaceX IPO: ‘I’m not sure that this could have gone much better’
summary: SpaceX executed the largest initial public offering in history, raising $75 billion while upending traditional Wall Street practices. Executives credited the offering's success to unconventional strategy and exceptional market conditions.
content: There were a lot of ways that SpaceX’s initial public offering could have gone wrong. Instead, the company bucked Wall Street norms, pulled off the biggest IPO ever and raised $75 billion.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克如何完美执行SpaceX IPO："我不确定这是否还能更好"
zh.summary: SpaceX完成了历史上最大规模的首次公开募股，融资750亿美元，同时颠覆了传统华尔街的做法。高管团队将此次发行的成功归功于非常规战略和极其有利的市场条件。

title: New SpaceX millionaires are reinventing the business of managing large wealth
summary: Wealth advisors report that newly minted SpaceX millionaires employ distinctive financial strategies, including technical troubleshooting and artificial intelligence tools. Their approach reflects engineering-focused problem-solving applied to wealth management.
content: Wealth advisors say SpaceXers have unique ways of addressing their financial challenges, including whiteboarding, troubleshooting and AI.

zh.title: 新晋SpaceX百万富翁正在重新定义大额财富管理业务
zh.summary: 财富顾问表示，新晋SpaceX百万富翁采用独特的财务策略，包括技术故障排查和人工智能工具。他们将工程导向的问题解决方法应用于财富管理。

title: Teen plans to leave uni 'debt free' after making £35,000 selling vintage football shirts
summary: University student Eleri Williams has earned £35,000 and established a retail shop selling vintage football shirts she initially sourced from her father. The entrepreneurial venture demonstrates profitability potential for niche e-commerce during higher education.
content: Eleri Williams started out selling her dad's old football shirts and has just opened her own shop.

zh.title: 少女计划通过销售复古足球衫赚取35,000英镑后"无债"毕业
zh.summary: 大学生埃莱里·威廉姆斯通过销售复古足球衫赚取了35,000英镑，并建立了零售店。这些足球衫最初来自她父亲的采购。这个创业企业展示了高等教育期间小众电商的盈利潜力。

title: FIFA World Cup prize money: What each USMNT player stands to earn
summary: A landmark 2022 agreement ensures U.S. women's soccer players receive a share of FIFA World Cup prize money, marking significant progress toward compensation equity. The arrangement establishes equal access to tournament earnings for the women's national team.
content: Thanks to a landmark 2022 agreement, U.S. women’s soccer players will get part of the World Cup prize pool, too. Here’s how it works.

zh.title: 国际足联世界杯奖金：美国女足队员将获得多少
zh.summary: 一项具有里程碑意义的2022年协议确保美国女足运动员获得国际足联世界杯奖金，标志着薪酬平等方面的重大进展。该协议为女足国家队建立了对锦标赛奖金的平等获取。

title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
summary: Social Security's cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 could reach 4.7% as inflation pressures mount, the highest adjustment in recent years. Rising costs across essential goods and services are driving the potential increase in beneficiary payments.
content: As inflation climbs, Social Security beneficiaries may see a higher cost-of-living adjustment in 2027. Here's which costs spiked most over the past 12 months.

zh.title: 社会保障2027年生活成本调整可能跃升至4.7%，一项估计发现。此图表显示推动涨幅的价格
zh.summary: 社会保障的生活成本调整在2027年可能达到4.7%，因为通胀压力上升，这是近年来最大的调整。生活必需品和服务成本的上升正在推动受益人支付可能增加。

title: Top House Republican’s family investment poised to benefit from SpaceX IPO
summary: Republican House Rep. Lisa McClain's husband holds up to $250,000 in Elon Musk's xAI, which was merged into SpaceX before its IPO, positioning the family to benefit substantially. The investment raises questions about political conflicts of interest surrounding major corporate transactions.
content: Republican Rep. Lisa McClain’s husband bought up to $250,000 in Elon Musk’s xAI before it was folded into SpaceX ahead of its IPO.

zh.title: 众议院顶级共和党议员的家族投资有望从SpaceX IPO中获益
zh.summary: 共和党众议院代表丽莎·麦克莱恩的丈夫持有高达25万美元的埃隆·马斯克的xAI股权，该公司在SpaceX IPO前被并入SpaceX，使该家族有望大幅受益。这项投资引发了对围绕重大企业交易的政治利益冲突的质疑。

title: Call Kevin Warsh the Fed 'chairman'
summary: Kevin Warsh, the new Federal Reserve chair, prefers the title "chairman" rather than "chair," departing from recent predecessors' terminology choices. The stylistic preference reflects personal leadership approach at the nation's central bank.
content: Kevin Warsh's two immediate predecessors preferred to be called the Fed "chair." For Warsh, it's "chairman" of the Federal Reserve.

zh.title: 称凯文·瓦什为美联储'主席'
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席凯文·瓦什偏好使用'主席'这一头衔，而非'主任'，这与近期前任们的术语选择不同。这种风格偏好反映了他对美国中央银行的个人领导方式。

title: SpaceX 'proxies' plunge as real deal arrives: Here's where traders are buying the dip
summary: Stocks of companies viewed as SpaceX proxies have plunged as the actual company's IPO was completed, unwinding significant pre-offering gains. Traders are selectively buying depressed proxy stocks in search of remaining value.
content: SpaceX "proxy stocks," whose options volumes were booming ahead of Friday's historic initial public offering, are unwinding gains.

zh.title: SpaceX"代理股"暴跌，实际交易来临：交易员在哪里抄底

title: How to decide whether a major splurge — like spending thousands on Knicks or World Cup tickets — is worth it
summary: Financial advisors recommend assessing luxury purchases like expensive sporting event tickets through specific decision-making criteria before committing funds. The framework helps consumers balance desire against financial prudence and long-term value.

title: ‘I feel like he may be taking advantage of us’: Our adviser pushes annuities after we already said no. Do we fire him?
summary: A financial adviser continues recommending annuities to clients who previously declined the product, raising concerns about the adviser's fiduciary duty and motivations. The situation highlights tensions between client autonomy and adviser commission incentives.
content: “I feel like he may be taking advantage of us.”

zh.summary: 一位财务顾问继续向之前拒绝该产品的客户推荐年金产品，引发了对顾问信义责任和动机的担忧。这种情况突出了客户自主权和顾问佣金激励之间的紧张关系。

title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
summary: SpaceX priced its IPO at $135 per share, valuing the company at $1.77 trillion, with shares surging 25% on debut. The strong performance reflects significant investor appetite, though some question whether the valuation is justified.
content: SpaceX set a fixed price of $135 per share in the leadup to its IPO on Friday, placing its valuation at $1.77 trillion. Shares rallied more than 25%.

zh.title: 小投资者争相参与SpaceX IPO，尽管有人认为估值"荒唐"
zh.summary: SpaceX将IPO定价为每股135美元，公司估值达1.77万亿美元，首日股价上涨25%。强劲的表现反映了投资者的巨大热情，尽管有人质疑估值是否合理。

title: SpaceX market cap tops $2 trillion after shares of Elon Musk's rocket company gain 25% on debut
summary: SpaceX's market capitalization exceeded $2 trillion following a 25% gain on its first trading day on the Nasdaq. The surge reflects strong investor confidence in the company's space and transportation business.
content: SpaceX shares soared on Friday as trading commenced on the Nasdaq.

title: What comes next for SpaceX after the IPO will be in focus for investors. Here's what's ahead
summary: Investors are now focused on whether SpaceX can sustain momentum beyond its IPO debut. The company's ability to maintain investor enthusiasm in the coming weeks will be a key indicator of long-term performance.

title: Trump admin: Iran deal signing likely in coming days, but not '100%' certain
summary: A senior Trump administration official stated that an Iran war peace deal could be signed within days, though uncertainty remains. The announcement comes after recent conflicting statements from both parties involved in the conflict.
content: A deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon, a senior Trump administration official said, following conflicting statements in recent days from the warring nations.

zh.title: 特朗普政府：伊朗协议可能在未来几天签署，但不是"100%"确定
zh.summary: 特朗普政府高级官员表示，伊朗战争和平协议可能在数天内签署，但仍存在不确定性。该声明是在冲突双方最近发表相互矛盾的声明后发表的。

title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
summary: Elon Musk's net worth reached approximately $1.05 trillion as SpaceX began trading, with his SpaceX stake valued at over $766 billion. This milestone makes him the world's first trillionaire, underscoring wealth creation from his companies' success.
content: Elon Musk's stake in SpaceX is worth more than $766 billion. Combined with his Tesla holdings, Musk's net worth as of Friday is roughly $1.05 trillion.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克在SpaceX开始在纳斯达克交易时成为世界首位万亿富翁
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克的净资产随着SpaceX开始交易达到约1.05万亿美元，他的SpaceX股份价值超过7660亿美元。这一里程碑使他成为世界首位万亿富翁，强调了他公司成功创造的财富。

title: This hidden investing flaw is costing you money. Talking to political opponents fixes it.
summary: Political bias in investment decisions can cost investors significant returns, as market performance is independent of political ideology. Diversifying beyond politically aligned investments can improve financial outcomes.
content: The stock market doesn’t care about your politics. Insisting on a portfolio that’s red or blue can forfeit a lot of green.

zh.title: 这个隐藏的投资缺陷正在让你亏钱。与政治对手交谈可以修复这个问题。

title: Trump name still must come down from Kennedy Center, judge says
summary: A judge ruled that President Trump's name must be removed from the Kennedy Center, despite his request for a stay of the lower-court order. The case continues through federal appeals as the administration contests the decision.
content: President Donald Trump has asked a federal appeals court to stay a lower-court order that his name before removed from the performing arts center.

zh.title: 法官表示特朗普的名字仍需从肯尼迪中心移除
zh.summary: 尽管特朗普要求暂停下级法院的命令，法官仍裁定特朗普的名字必须从肯尼迪中心移除。当前政府对该裁决提出异议，案件继续在联邦上诉程序中进行。

title: FedEx's yearslong turnaround is facing a big test after executing on a major catalyst

title: Bitcoin's latest plunge revives the debate over owning it—and whether it's just 'crypto being crypto'
summary: Bitcoin's recent price decline has renewed questions about its portfolio role and volatility characteristics. The selloff prompts investors to reconsider bitcoin's value proposition amid ongoing debate about crypto market stability.

title: How to get SpaceX stock — without buying the IPO
summary: Investors can gain SpaceX exposure through mutual funds and exchange-traded funds without directly purchasing IPO shares. This approach provides an alternative for those seeking indirect investment in the newly public company.

title: As investors flock to SpaceX, one trader eyes a sleepy 'stealth' play
summary: While investors flock to SpaceX, one trader identifies an overlooked opportunity in an alternative stock. The recommendation suggests investors consider less obvious investment options beyond the current market focus.

title: SpaceX hit with sell rating by CFRA shortly after IPO
summary: Research firm CFRA issued a sell rating on SpaceX shortly after its IPO, citing concerns that the reusable Starship rocket could become a bottleneck. The rating suggests skepticism about the company's ability to scale production to meet demand.
content: Reusable Starship rocket could prove to be a "bottleneck" for multiple segments, research firm says.

zh.title: SpaceX在IPO后不久遭CFRA卖出评级

title: SpaceX’s Gwynne Shotwell had IPO doubts for years, now she has a message for investors

title: ChatGPT hits a billion monthly app users despite souring public AI sentiment

title: A Chinese start-up's unfolding dilemma exposes cracks in Beijing's tech funding machine
summary: A Chinese startup's struggles have revealed structural weaknesses in Beijing's government-backed tech funding model, which relies on direct equity stakes from officials at multiple levels. This contrasts with the U.S. approach of indirect support through incentives and tax benefits. The issue highlights challenges in how different governments manage tech sector investments.
content: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.

zh.title: 一家中国初创公司的困境暴露了北京科技融资机制的裂缝
